creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2008-06-24 19:57:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/opera            Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    www/opera/files      patch-install.sh 
  Removed files:
    www/opera            pkg-message 
    www/opera/files      patch-search.ini symhack.c 
  Log:
  Update to version 9.5:
  - drop 4.x support
  - native amd64 binaries
  - changed to the mail storage format
  - changed shortcuts (part of the old one can be enabled back via Preferences)
  - no search.ini FreeBSD customizations anymore (but it will keep your custom
  searches)
  
  See full log at:
  http://www.opera.com/docs/changelogs/freebsd/950/
  
  PR:             ports/124678
  Submitted by:   Arjan van Leeuwen (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.74      +27 -74    ports/www/opera/Makefile
  1.49      +15 -9     ports/www/opera/distinfo
  1.27      +14 -346   ports/www/opera/files/patch-install.sh
  1.7       +0 -48     ports/www/opera/files/patch-search.ini (dead)
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/www/opera/files/symhack.c (dead)
  1.13      +0 -6      ports/www/opera/pkg-message (dead)
  1.33      +242 -102  ports/www/opera/pkg-plist
